channel.title: 网络编程 on William Fang
channel.description: Recent content in 网络编程 on William Fang

item.title: Solarflare网卡开发：efvi 低延时应用
item.description: 概念 开发 Demo 服务端 客户端

item.title: Solarflare网卡开发：openonload 安装与调试
item.description: OpenOnload 技术 固件信息 可以通过命令查看当前的网卡连接情况 ip address 1: lo: <LOOPBACK,UP,LOWER_UP> mtu 65536 qdisc noqueue state UNKNOWN group default qlen 1000 link/loopback 00:00:00:00:00:00 brd 00:00:00:00:00:00 inet 127.0.0.1/8 scope host lo valid_lft forever preferred_lft forever inet6 ::1/128 scope host valid_lft forever preferred_lft forever 2: enp5s0: <BROADCAST,MULTICAST,UP,LOWER_UP> mtu 1500 qdisc pfifo_fast state UP group

item.title: Unix Network Programming 代码学习
item.description: 网络编程的圣经 Chap.0 安装源代码 安装步骤 ## git clone git@github.com:williamlfang/unix-network-programming-v3.git cd unix-network-programming-v3-master ./configure cd lib # build the basic library that all programs need make # use "gmake" everywhere on BSD/OS systems cd ../libfree # continue building the basic library make 测试 ## 编译 cd intro make ## 启动服务器 sudo ./daytimetcpsrv ## 运
